header.title: Feature-Sliced Design Rules
header.description: Establishing a strict hierarchy of layers and dependency boundaries to ensure horizontal and vertical decoupling.

hierarchy.title: Mental Hierarchy
hierarchy.description: Dependency flow is always downward: upper layers use lower ones, but never vice versa.

boundaries.title: Dependency Boundaries
boundaries.desc: Each layer has clearly defined import permissions.

entities.title: Standard Entity Structure
entities.description: Each entity is a self-contained module. We use strict subfolder separation for predictability and maintainability.

items.api: RTK Query definitions for backend interaction.
items.types: Separation into interfaces and types for clean code.
items.handlers: Logic not tied to UI state.
items.mock: Ability to work without a backend.
items.index: Entry point for access from upper layers.

widgets.title: Widget: Model & UI Separation
widgets.description: Widgets are "smart" blocks. We separate logic (model) from the visual part (ui) to simplify testing and refactoring.
widgets.importance_desc: The model/ folder contains everything that makes the widget functional (Zod schemas, form configs, local types). The ui/ folder contains only display components.
